name: UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INC
summary: UnitedHealth Group is a health care and well-being company operating two primary businesses: Optum and UnitedHealthcare. Optum provides health services through Optum Health (patient-centered care, 95 million consumers), Optum Insight (data analytics, technology), and Optum Rx (pharmacy care services, $188 billion in pharmaceutical spending managed). UnitedHealthcare offers health benefits across Employer & Individual, Medicare & Retirement, and Community & State segments, arranging discounted care access through extensive provider networks.

products.name: Optum Health
products.description: Patient-centered care including primary, specialty, surgical, behavioral health, post-acute, telehealth, and remote patient monitoring services for 95 million consumers.

products.name: Optum Insight
products.description: Data, analytics, technology and managed services for hospitals, health plans, governments, and life sciences companies to improve efficiency and reduce costs.

products.name: Optum Rx
products.description: Pharmacy care services through ~64,000 retail pharmacies, home delivery, specialty pharmacies, infusion services, and rare disease support, managing $188 billion in pharmaceutical spending.

products.name: Optum Financial / Optum Bank
products.description: Health financial services managing nearly 26 million consumer accounts with over $27 billion in assets under management, including digital payment and financing systems.

products.name: UnitedHealthcare Employer & Individual
products.description: Health benefits for individuals, sole proprietorships, large multi-site employers, national employers, and public sector employers.

products.name: UnitedHealthcare Medicare & Retirement
products.description: Health and well-being benefits designed for seniors and Medicare-eligible consumers.

products.name: UnitedHealthcare Community & State
products.description: Health benefits for economically disadvantaged, medically underserved, and those without employer-sponsored coverage.
